name: Aristocrat Leisure Limited
analysis: ALL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$54.3200, stop A$49.5594, target A$68.6018 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
